mapper.select:
SELECT rr.RQST_NO, rr.RQST_TY_CD, TO_CHAR(rr.RCPT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RCPT_DT, TO_CHAR(rr.MVIN_PRD_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MVIN_PRD_DT, TO_CHAR(rr.MVOUT_PRD_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MVOUT_PRD_DT, TO_CHAR(rr.APRV_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APRV_DT, rr.MVOUT_RSN_CN, rr.RJCT_RSN_CN,
m.USER_NM, m.USER_TELNO,
ad.DONG_NO AS DONG, ad.HO,
CASE WHEN rr.RJCT_RSN_CN IS NOT NULL THEN 'RJCT' WHEN rr.APRV_DT IS NOT NULL THEN 'APRV' ELSE 'WAIT' END AS RQST_STTS_CD
FROM RESIDENT_RQST rr
LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON rr.USER_NO = m.USER_NO
LEFT JOIN APT_DETAIL ad ON rr.HO_NO = ad.HO_NO
ORDER BY rr.RCPT_DT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE RESIDENT_RQST SET RJCT_RSN_CN = #{rjctRsnCn}, MDF_DT = SYSDATE WHERE RQST_NO = #{rqstNo}
UPDATE RESIDENT_RQST SET APRV_DT = SYSDATE, MDF_DT = SYSDATE WHERE RQST_NO = #{rqstNo}
mapper.select: SELECT rr.RQST_NO, rr.USER_NO, rr.HO_NO, rr.RQST_TY_CD, rr.MVIN_PRD_DT, rr.MVOUT_PRD_DT FROM RESIDENT_RQST rr WHERE rr.RQST_NO = #{rqstNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE HSHLD_HEAD SET INOUT_CD = 'LIVE' WHERE HO_NO = #{hoNo} and USER_NO = #{userNo}
UPDATE AUTH SET USER_ROLE_CD = 'ROLE_RESIDENT' WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
